ham.subject: Your ProductName Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Hello User,

We hope you’re enjoying your experience with ProductName. This is a reminder that your subscription will renew on 15 September 2026. Your current plan is Premium, and the renewal amount is $99.99.

To ensure uninterrupted service, please confirm that your payment information is up to date. If you need to update your billing details or change your plan, log in to your account here: <URL>

Thank you for choosing ProductName. If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

Best regards,
ProductName Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your System Access is Suspended
